description.task: Implement a StructuredLogger class that builds structured log entries (JSON-like format) with consistent fields: timestamp, level, service name, correlation ID, message, and optional context. The output format enables log aggregation tools to parse entries reliably.
instructions: formatEntry() builds the JSON string in the exact order shown: timestamp, level, service, correlationId, message, context
Context should be appended as: ',"context":{"key1":"val1","key2":"val2"}' (iterate map entries)
log() returns null when shouldLog() returns false, otherwise returns formatEntry()
Context keys and values should not have any additional escaping beyond wrapping in double quotes

description.task: Build a MetricsAggregator class that collects application metrics (counters, gauges, timers) and generates statistical summaries. Support percentile calculations (p50, p95, p99) for response time distributions, used in SLO/SLA monitoring.
instructions: percentile() implementation is provided — do not change it
timerStats() computes all 6 statistics using the provided methods and stream operations
min: min of times stream, max: max of times stream, mean: average (as long), p50/p95/p99: use percentile()
mean should be rounded to the nearest long (use Math.round)
Return an empty map if no times have been recorded for the timer
description.hint: timerStats(): Map<String, Long> result = new HashMap<>(); result.put('min', times.stream().min(Long::compare).get()); result.put('max', ..max..); result.put('mean', Math.round(times.stream().mapToLong(x->x).average().orElse(0))); result.put('p50', percentile(timerName, 50)); etc.

description.task: Implement a CorrelationIdPropagator class that manages correlation IDs across microservice calls. The ID originates at the API gateway and must be passed to all downstream services via HTTP headers. Implement ID generation, extraction, and thread-local storage for request-scoped tracking.
instructions: extractOrGenerate() checks incomingHeaders for HEADER_NAME key; if found, use that value; otherwise call generate()
extractOrGenerate() calls set() to store the ID in ThreadLocal and returns it
addToHeaders() creates a new LinkedHashMap, copies outgoingHeaders, adds the current correlation ID, and returns it
addToHeaders() should not modify the original outgoingHeaders map
clear() removes the ThreadLocal value to prevent memory leaks
description.hint: extractOrGenerate(): String id = incomingHeaders.getOrDefault(HEADER_NAME, generate()); set(id); return id. addToHeaders(): Map<String,String> result = new LinkedHashMap<>(outgoingHeaders); result.put(HEADER_NAME, get()); return result.
description.expectedOutput:
Extracted: cid-abc123
Current: cid-abc123
Has correlation ID: true
ID preserved: true
